summary: Completed comprehensive testing of accounting batch processing system. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success), frontend integration mostly working with minor UX improvements needed.

integration_issues.issue: Form stays on upload page after successful submission instead of showing success message or redirecting immediately

passed_tests: Lotes list endpoint (/api/v1/lotes) returns empty array initially
Create lote endpoint successfully processes Excel files
Get lote details endpoint works correctly
Dashboard loads with statistics cards correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UX improvement: Make upload form show success message and redirect to lote details page immediately after successful submission. Current behavior stays on upload form page.
